creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, our list and PR software is english only. Please submit an 
english entry (by following up on this message) explaining what you 
want, also include the information that can currently be found on the 
AMD64 motherboards already 
(http://www.freebsd.org/platforms/amd64/motherboards.html) thank you.
